title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Crossword Bookstores is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
